text: Housekeeping: workstream 0011's final loop-state flips (iteration 028 accepted; workstream closed) happened after its last PR merged, so they are uncommitted on main. Land them in history through a proper working iteration, per the repo rule that every change goes through a lume workstream.
title: Record workstream 0011's final accepted+closed state in history
done_when: The 0011 state.json/objective.json closure flips are committed and merged to main via PR; this workstream is then closed.
